headline: Barclays Raises its Price Target on Pinnacle West (PNW) to $102
summary: Pinnacle West Capital Corporation (NYSE:PNW) is one of the 15 Best Power Generation Stocks To Buy For Data Center Demand. On May 5, 2026, Barclays analyst Nicholas Campanella raised the firm’s price target on Pinnacle West Capital Corporation (NYSE:PNW) to $102 from $101 and maintained an Equal Weight rating following the company’s Q1 report.
